Equity Research Analyst Note  
Date: 15th October 2023

Mr. Tan Wei Ming, our lead analyst, has issued an update ahead of the forthcoming earnings release for GigaTech Solutions Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202345678A). The company is scheduled to announce its third-quarter earnings on 30th October 2023, and our projections indicate a promising increase in revenue driven by their recent expansion into the Southeast Asian market.

Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Head of Market Analysis, notes that the company's strategic partnerships have positioned it well against competitors. Despite potential market volatility, we anticipate a growth of approximately 15% in net profit, reaching an estimated SGD 5.2 million for this quarter.

For additional insights, please contact Ramasamy Muthu at our research department. He can be reached at +65 6876 1234 or via email at analysis@gigatech.sg.

This document is intended for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice. Please refer to our full disclaimer for further details. NRIC: S7654321D.
